channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3250] fc18: Test failure on test suite lfsck
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b31f22fc-aecb-11e2-a127-52540035b04c.

22:19:57:client-27vm7: lfsck: pass4 OK (no duplicates)
22:19:57:lfsck: fixed 14 errors
22:19:57:CMD: client-27vm7 grep -c /mnt/lustre' ' /proc/mounts
22:19:57:Stopping client client-27vm7 /mnt/lustre (opts
22:19:57:CMD: client-27vm7 lsof -t /mnt/lustre
22:19:58:CMD: client-27vm7 umount /mnt/lustre 2>&1
22:19:58:lfsck finished with rc=1
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/mdsdb’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/mdsdb.mdshdr’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/ostdb-0’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/ostdb-1’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/ostdb-2’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/ostdb-3’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/ostdb-4’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/ostdb-5’
22:19:58:removed ‘/home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2013-04-25/153008-70194508889820/ostdb-6’
22:19:58: lfsck : @@@@@@ FAIL: lfsck test 2 - finished with rc=1
22:19:58: Trace dump:
22:19:58: = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4024:error_noexit()
22:19:58: = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4047:error()
22:19:58: = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/lfsck.sh:283:main()
22:19:58:Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2013-04-25/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-vs-lustre-reviews-fc18-x86_64-full-2_4_1_15112_-70194508889820-153004/lfsck..*.1366953373.log
22:19:58:CMD: client-27vm1,client-27vm2.lab.whamcloud.com,client-27vm7,client-27vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2013-04-25/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-vs-lustre-reviews-fc18-x86_64-full-2_4_1_15112_-70194508889820-153004/lfsck..debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1366953373.log;
22:19:59: dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2013-04-25/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-vs-lustre-reviews-fc18-x86_64-full-2_4_1_15112_-70194508889820-153004/lfsck..dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1366953373.log
22:19:59:lfsck returned 0
22:19:59:running: conf-sanity
item.summary: fc18: Test failure on test suite lfsck

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: The related issue has been addressed in LU-3180.
